news.paragraph: Hims & Hers is expanding its integrated health access through platform enhancements and a push into the Canadian GLP-1 market, testing its broader wellness subscription model. The company saw a significant insider stock purchase following a pivot towards weight-loss drugs, signaling confidence from management. These developments suggest a positive trajectory for the company's growth initiatives.

headlines.title: Hims & Hers Expands Integrated Health Access via Platform Expansion
Hims And Hers Canadian GLP 1 Push Tests Broader Wellness Subscription Thesis
Hims Insider Makes First Stock Purchase Since 2021 Amid Weight-Loss Drug Pivot
HIMS vs. TEM: Which AI Healthcare Stock Offers Better Upside Now?
Hims & Hers Shares Rally On Million-Dollar Insider Purchase
